MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-26-2001 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 220 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-01-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 210 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL, DEPT 210. JUDGE THOMAS J MELLON JR. CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, CSR JUNE LEATHLEY. PARTIES PRESENT: MICHAEL ROSSOFF ATTY FOR PLTF, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. AFTER CONSIDERING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, JUDGMENT IS AWARDED TO PLTF AGAINST DEFT GARY KOCH FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES AT 217 EDDY ST, #519, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2077.55 PLUS $485 ATTY FEES, COSTS WAIVED. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT, EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOCH, GARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY STREET, #519, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,077.55 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,562.55, LEASE FORFEITED
